summary: Claude /goal is gated by trusted workspaces and unrestricted hooks, so it is not just a slash-command state write.
evidence: /Users/michelkerkmeester/.local/share/claude/ClaudeCode.app/Contents/MacOS/claude strings:143046 '/goal is only available in trusted workspaces'
/Users/michelkerkmeester/.local/share/claude/ClaudeCode.app/Contents/MacOS/claude strings:143047 '/goal can't run while hooks are restricted'
target: .opencode/commands/goal.md as thin router backed by .opencode/plugins/mk-goal.js hook/lifecycle behavior
decision: Validate plugin/hook availability before treating a goal as active; command-only storage is insufficient.
risk: OpenCode may not expose hook restriction state synchronously, requiring a plugin-published hooksUnavailable/lastError state.

summary: Claude completion detection appears Stop-hook verifier driven, with met/not-yet-met events and last_reason iteration state, not normal assistant self-report.

/Users/michelkerkmeester/.local/share/claude/ClaudeCode.app/Contents/MacOS/claude strings:188035-188040 active_goal goal_status tengu_goal_failed goal_met impossible tengu_goal_achieved

/Users/michelkerkmeester/.local/share/claude/ClaudeCode.app/Contents/MacOS/claude strings:313053-313054 internal active_goal event emitted when the /goal Stop hook reports met or not-yet-met and bumps iterations plus last_reason
target: .opencode/plugins/mk-goal.js verifier after assistant turn, storing lastCheck, lastReason, iterations
decision: Use an independent verifier result of met|not_met|impossible; only met marks complete, not_met continues, impossible blocks.
risk: session.idle/message.updated may race with new user input if OpenCode has no true Stop hook.

summary: Claude behavior implies active continue-until-met with an explicit /goal clear escape, so passive injection alone does not match the target behavior.
evidence: /Users/michelkerkmeester/.local/share/claude/ClaudeCode.app/Contents/MacOS/claude strings:188043-188044 hook_additional_context and Stop hook prevented continuation
/Users/michelkerkmeester/.local/share/claude/ClaudeCode.app/Contents/MacOS/claude strings:210105-210108 Goal active and Goal achieved
target: .opencode/plugins/mk-goal.js lifecycle using session.idle -> session.prompt if G5 confirms that seam
decision: Choose active continuation with max-iteration, wall-clock, budget, and generation/kill-switch guards.
risk: Runaway or stale continuations unless /goal clear, pause, complete, and new set invalidate pending callbacks.

summary: Claude exposes active goal state as a visible indicator with Last check, Goal active, Goal achieved, and No goal set copy.
evidence: /Users/michelkerkmeester/.local/share/claude/ClaudeCode.app/Contents/MacOS/claude strings:210102-210111 Goal Last check Goal active Goal achieved set another set one No goal set
/Users/michelkerkmeester/.local/share/claude/ClaudeCode.app/Contents/MacOS/claude strings:313053-313054 surfaces with a goal indicator re-render from active_goal
target: .opencode/plugins/mk-goal.js every-turn injection plus .opencode/commands/goal.md show, optionally a goal_status tool/context output
decision: Implement v1 as a status-line substitute: injection plus /goal show displays objective, status, last check, iterations, and budget fields.
risk: Without a persistent OpenCode overlay, users may miss active state until the next turn or explicit /goal show.

summary: Claude restores goal state on resume and uses short command outputs for set, clear, no-goal, usage, and condition-length failures.
evidence: /Users/michelkerkmeester/.local/share/claude/ClaudeCode.app/Contents/MacOS/claude strings:221799-221803 goal_status goal_set Stop prompt tengu_goal_restored_on_resume

/Users/michelkerkmeester/.local/share/claude/ClaudeCode.app/Contents/MacOS/claude strings:343969-343989 No goal set, Goal cleared, Goal set, condition length limit, usage, not yet evaluated, Goal active
target: goal state store consumed by .opencode/plugins/mk-goal.js and .opencode/commands/goal.md
decision: Persist goals by session/thread key and restore on session initialization; add a command-level objective length cap.
risk: Old active goals can revive unexpectedly on resume, so auto-continuation should wait for a fresh session/turn signal and show age/last-check data.
